testcase.name: test_multichip_precision_candidate[blackhole-blackhole-1x4-ring]

failure.message: TypeError: FunctionalDecoder.__init__() got an unexpected keyword argument 'split_q_weight'

testcase.failure:
mesh_device = MeshDevice(1x4 grid, 4 devices) record_property = <function record_property.<locals>.append_property at 0x721e5c6456c0>
@_mesh_test def test_multichip_precision_candidate(mesh_device, record_property): """Cross real-weight projection dtype/fidelity and explicit SDPA policy."""
candidate_id = os.environ.get("MULTICHIP_PRECISION_CANDIDATE") if candidate_id not in PRECISION_CANDIDATES: pytest.skip(f"set MULTICHIP_PRECISION_CANDIDATE to one of {sorted(PRECISION_CANDIDATES)}") > _run_decode_policy_candidate( mesh_device, record_property, candidate_id=candidate_id, changes=PRECISION_CANDIDATES[candidate_id], pcc_threshold=0.99, )
